system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          0.0025;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|omega)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    "(U|k|omega)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    2;
    nCorrectors         1;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

viscosityModel  constant;

nu              1e-02;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Bottom face (z=0): x=-1 to x=0.2, y=-0.5 to y=0.5
    (-1  -0.5  0)    // 0
    ( 0.2 -0.5  0)    // 1
    ( 0.2  0.5  0)    // 2
    (-1  0.5  0)    // 3

    // Top face (z=0.1)
    (-1  -0.5  0.1)  // 4
    ( 0.2 -0.5  0.1)  // 5
    ( 0.2  0.5  0.1)  // 6
    (-1  0.5  0.1)    // 7
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (50 50 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 7 4)
        );
    }
    cylinder
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (3 2 6 7)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type zeroGradient;
        faces
        (
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            (4 5 6 7)
            (0 1 2 3)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (0 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet

        type            fixedValue;

    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            noSlip;
    }

    bottom

        type            noSlip;
    }

    {

    }

    frontAndBack

    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

internalField   uniform 0;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;

    top
    {

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile

laminar

file: /pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_C_20260516_195157_run3/runs/Cylinder/3/constant/momentumTransport/laminar from line 13 to line 21.

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error: `keyword nuInf is undefined in dictionary ".../constant/momentumTransport/laminar"`

**Diagnosis:**

The error is:

```
keyword nuInf is undefined in dictionary ".../constant/momentumTransport/laminar"
```

This means the `laminar` sub-dictionary in `constant/momentumTransport` is missing the `nuInf` keyword. Looking at the current file structure after Attempt 5's fix:

```
laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalisedNewtonian;

    viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        nuInf   10;
        m       0.4;
        n       3;
    }
}
```

The `nuInf`, `m`, and `n` parameters are nested inside `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs`, but the solver is looking for them **directly inside the `laminar` dictionary** at the same level as `laminarModel` and `viscosityModel`. The `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs` sub-dictionary acts as a container for the coefficients, but the individual coefficient keys (`nuInf`, `m`, `n`) need to be accessible at the parent level as well.

**Resolution:**

Move the coefficient key-value pairs (`nuInf`, `m`, `n`) from inside `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs` up to the top level of the `laminar` dictionary. The corrected structure should be:

```
laminar
{
    laminarModel    generalisedNewtonian;

    viscosityModel  CrossPowerLaw;

    nuInf   10;
    m       0.4;
    n       3;

    generalizedNewtonianCoeffs
    {
        // Empty or keep existing entries if needed by the solver
    }
}
```

Specifically:
- Extract `nuInf 10;` from inside `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs` and place it directly in the `laminar` dictionary.
- Extract `m 0.4;` and place it directly in the `laminar` dictionary.
- Extract `n 3;` and place it directly in the `laminar` dictionary.
- The `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs` block can remain (it may be required by the solver to locate the coefficients), but the individual parameter keys must also exist at the `laminar` level.

All other files remain unchanged. This is purely a hierarchical dictionary structure issue — the coefficients need to be resolvable both as members of `generalizedNewtonianCoeffs` and as direct children of `laminar`.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'constant/momentumTransport', 'changes': 'In the laminar sub-dictionary, move nuInf 10 from inside generalizedNewtonianCoeffs to the top level of laminar; Move m 0.4 from inside generalizedNewtonianCoeffs to the top level of laminar; Move n 3 from inside generalizedNewtonianCoeffs to the top level of laminar'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar offsetcylinder simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm with a generalized Newtonian model and Cross-Power-Law viscosity for momentum transport, characterized by specific parameters nuInf=10, m=0.4, n=3. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 1.5m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls, including the cylinder surface. Use timestep of 0.0025 and output every 0.05. Finaltime is 0.5. use constant viscosity model with nu value of 1e-02 in physical properties.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
